---
title: "George Parker Heathcote"
---

## George Parker Heathcote

**Dates:** (1828-15 Feb 1871)

### Description

son of Sir William Heathcote’s first marriage

### Biography

He returned from India a cripple with ‘creeping paralysis’ in February 1860. He married (15 Jun 1869) his cousin Isabella Margaretta Elizabeth Walpole (d. 1938). After the Moberlys left Field House he lived there.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]
- Letter from Feb 20th [1871]
- Letter from [late December 1838  or early January  1839]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
